name: Bagels 7
recipeIngredient: Poppy seeds, sesame seeds, kosher salt, minced onion (for toppings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all dough ingredients except barley malt syrup to the bread machine in the order suggested by your manual. Process on the dough cycle as per manufacturer's directions.
2. When the dough cycle ends, remove the dough from the machine. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Divide the dough into 8 pieces. Roll each piece into a roll about 12 inches long. Form each piece into a circle, overlapping the ends by at least an inch and pressing or rolling the overlap tightly to seal. Let the bagels rise for 5 minutes.
4. Add the barley malt syrup to boiling water (this gives the bagels their golden color). Lower a few bagels at a time into the boiling water. As soon as the bagels float to the top, remove them with a skimmer or spatula to a lightly greased baking sheet.
5. Sprinkle about 3/4 teaspoon of toppings over each bagel and bake for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
